report.summary: Community growth cycle v6 — FOMC T-1 evening push: Fear & Greed disconnect narrative (BTC $75K vs F&G 15, widest gap since Nov 2024 pre-$108K run), ETF streak thread (6 days, $1.3B+ March), tax countdown urgency (28 days), Pectra T-24 soft push, DCA accumulation signal; social card created (Fear & Greed dual-panel with gauge + price chart + historical comparison); newsletter DEGEN CORNER insert drafted; 380 pages in file, production stale at 378 (git lock ~27h).

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet (Tue night): Fear & Greed disconnect — BTC at $75K with F&G at 15, widest gap since Nov 2024 ($67K → $108K pattern); CTA to /learn/fomc-fed-rate-crypto-guide

Twitter Thread (Tue late night, 3 posts): ETF inflow streak — 6 straight days, $1.3B+ March, institutions accumulating while retail frozen; CTAs to /tools/bloomberg-screener + /learn/fomc-fed-rate-crypto-guide
Tweet (Wed morning): Tax countdown — 28 days to April 15, exchanges now file 1099s, DeFi/staking/airdrops all taxable; CTAs to /tools/tax-calculator + /learn/crypto-tax-guide-2026
Tweet (Tue/Wed): DCA signal — F&G 15 = accumulation territory for DCA investors; CTA to /tools/dca-calculator
Tweet (Wed): Pectra countdown — 24 days to Ethereum upgrade, EIP-7702 smart wallets, gas sponsorship, session keys; CTA to /learn/ethereum-pectra-upgrade-guide
Discord/Telegram (Tue night): FOMC eve final prep — rate odds, dot plot explainer, Powell press conference timing, sentiment disconnect analysis, tool links
Newsletter insert: DEGEN CORNER addition on Fear & Greed disconnect with DCA calculator CTA for Thu Mar 19 issue

sections.title: Visual Assets Created
items: social-fomc-eve-fear-greed-2026.svg — 1200x630 social card: BTC $75K price panel with mini uptrend chart (green) vs Fear & Greed gauge at 15 (red) with Nov 2024 historical comparison ($67K→$108K +61%); bottom stats row (ETF $1.3B+, Fed Decision Tomorrow, 380+ Pages, Tax 28 Days); glass-morphism cards on dark bg with brand gradient accents. Saved to /public/social-fomc-eve-fear-greed-2026.svg

sections.title: Analytics Context
items: 380 published pages in file — production stale at 378 (deploy cb65a9d from Day 42). Git lock ~27 hours blocking all deploys.
PUBLISH_QUEUE: 2 items (Hyperliquid trading guide + FOMC Fed rate guide). FOMC guide is time-critical — decision tomorrow 2pm ET.
FOMC guide trapped on disk during peak search intent. This is the #1 missed opportunity. Every hour = lost organic traffic at T-1.
Fear & Greed at 15 with BTC at $75K creates strong social engagement hook — historical pattern comparisons drive high engagement.
ETF inflow streak (6 days, $1.3B+ March) is under-covered narrative. Thread format expected to perform well.
Tax season entering acceleration zone — 28 days to deadline. Dual push on guide + calculator for commercial intent capture.
Pectra T-24 is a slower burn but important for Ethereum audience. Softer push to maintain narrative continuity.
Social drafts saved to /reports/community-drafts/2026-03-17-social-drafts-v6.md

sections.title: Deploy Blocker Impact on Community
items: Git lock prevents FOMC guide from going live during peak search intent (FOMC T-1). This single blocker is the largest community/growth impact item.
Social posts drafted for FOMC guide CTA — but the page isn't live on production. Posts linking to undeployed pages deliver poor UX.
Recommendation: Hold FOMC-guide-specific tweets until deploy confirms. Use evergreen page links (bloomberg-screener, dca-calculator, tax-guide) for tonight's posts.
Newsletter (Thu) has buffer time — if git lock clears by Wed, FOMC guide will be live and linkable for the issue.
